caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a navy blue baseball cap with a logo, and a gold chain around his neck sits in a studio setting. He is wearing headphones and speaking into a professional microphone. Behind him is a white wall featuring stars and the words "BOSS HUSTLE" and "TALK 101." Red and white logos appear on the screen, including "BOSS TALK 101" and a "STUDIO PODCAST" icon. Across the sequence, the man is actively speaking, gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. In the first frame, he has both hands raised; by the second, he extends his right arm outward. In the third frame, he brings his hands closer to his body, and in the final frame, he settles into a more stationary position while continuing to speak, with his hands resting below the frame's view.
